pilots.name: E2 Pilot: Official absorption metric pipeline on 5 checkpoints
pilots.objective: Validate the official absorption metric pipeline and confirm stable dead-neuron estimation before scaling to full representativeness analysis.
pilots.pass_criteria: All 5 checkpoints load successfully; official absorption metric returns finite values; dead-neuron rate is stable (computed on >=50k tokens).

pilots.name: E1 Pilot: SAEBench data validation
pilots.objective: Validate that SAEBench Pythia-160M metrics are complete and well-formed before running the downstream causal cost meta-analysis.
pilots.pass_criteria: All required metrics are present for >=18 of 20 sampled SAEs; no missing-value rate >10%.

pilots.name: E3 Pilot: Task-agnostic absorption metric (geography domain)
pilots.objective: Pilot a task-agnostic absorption metric on a single domain to demonstrate domain-dependence. Given prior refutation of H3, this is scoped as a pilot-only negative-result demonstration.
steps: Define 10 parent-child concept pairs for the geography domain
Collect 100 diverse sentences from C4 containing these concepts
Train logistic regression probes on residual-stream activations for each concept
For probe-true tokens, identify top-k SAE latents
Classify absorption when parent probe succeeds but no parent-matching latent fires above threshold
pilots.pass_criteria: At least 5 valid parent-child pairs are processed; probe training converges (accuracy > 0.7); absorption detection pipeline returns a finite domain score.

pilots.name: E4 Pilot: Pareto tradeoff validation (2 families, 1 stratum)
pilots.objective: Validate the Pareto analysis pipeline on a small matched stratum before scaling to all 7 Pythia-160M families.
pilots.stratum_criteria: same hook point (resid_post), same dictionary width (~16k)
pilots.pass_criteria: All checkpoints in the stratum load and compute successfully; Pareto front script runs without error; at least one non-dominated point per family.

contingencies.if_e2_pilot_fails: Debug SAELens API or sae-spelling dependency issues. If official absorption metric is unavailable, fall back to SAEBench precomputed absorption scores for Pythia-160M and skip GPT-2 absorption computation.
contingencies.if_e1_pilot_fails: If SAEBench metrics are incomplete, narrow the regression to the subset of SAEs with complete data and report coverage as a limitation.
contingencies.if_e3_pilot_fails: If probe training fails or hierarchy discovery is too noisy, report the pilot as inconclusive and scope E3 to a qualitative discussion rather than a numerical claim.
contingencies.if_e4_pilot_fails: If matched stratum has too few checkpoints, relax width matching to +/- 2x and report the matching criteria explicitly.
